SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT NAZZI SHISHIDO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT NAVID OREIZY IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE CROSS-CLAIM; PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHISHIDO, NAZZI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OREIZY, NAVID $2,287.06 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,537.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OREIZY, NAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SHISHIDO, NAZZI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
